import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core'; import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http'; import { Customer } from '../../models/customer'; @Component({ selector: 'customer', templateUrl: './customer.component.html' }) export class CustomerComponent { public customers: Customer[] = []; constructor(http: HttpClient, @Inject('BASE_URL') baseUrl: string) { const customersEndPoint = baseUrl + 'api/customer/all'; console.log("End point :" + customersEndPoint); http.get(customersEndPoint).subscribe( result => { this.customers = result; console.log("results :" + this.customers.length); }, error => console.error(error)); } }
